blocks.text: are you able to recall my last request?

Your last request was to edit your "Solutions" tab on your website so that it focuses more on advertising what you can do rather than just listing services. Specifically, you wanted to promote and advertise solutions such as helping businesses find hidden customer groups through segmentation analysis, along with including visual elements like images or analysis results.

I provided an updated version of the `Projects.tsx` file to reflect these changes, focusing on describing the solutions and benefits more clearly. The proposed updates include:

- Updating the description of each service to highlight what you can do.
- Adding a section for highlights.
- Including icons, checkmarks, and clear headings.
- Providing detailed descriptions of each project with clear value propositions.

Would you like me to apply these changes now, or do you need further adjustments?

Sure, I'll apply the changes to the `Projects.tsx` file based on your feedback. Here is the updated content for `Projects.tsx`: ```tsx import { Header } from "../components/Header"; import { Footer } from "../components/Footer"; import logo from "../../imports/Pantera_Claw.png"; const highlights = [ "Identify hidden customer groups and who to target", "Detect equipment faults or security threats from sound alone", "Turn raw data into clear, actionable business profiles", "AI that finds patterns your team doesn't have time to look for", "99%+ accuracy — results you can actually act on", "Real examples built on real data, not theory", ]; const services = [ { id: "web", icon: , label: "Web Development", projects: [], }, { id: "database", icon: , label: "Database Management", projects: [], }, { id: "dashboards", icon: , label: "Dashboards & Reporting", projects: [], }, { id: "ai", icon: , label: "AI & Agentic Workflows", projects: [ { icon: , title: "Drone Sound Classification", desc: "Trained an AI model to listen to audio and identify exactly what it's hearing — with 99% accuracy. In your business, it could detect equipment faults, production line issues, or security threats from sound alone.", value: "If a problem in your operation makes a sound, AI can be trained to hear it — catching issues before they become costly.", link: "/case-study/drone-classification", }, { icon: , title: "Customer Profiling", desc: "Used AI to analyze 530,000+ customer records and automatically discovered 5 distinct buyer types — each with its own behavior and recommended marketing strategy.", value: "Stop sending the same message to everyone. We find the hidden groups in your customer data so you can market smarter and increase revenue per customer.", link: "/case-study/customer-segmentation", }, ], }, ]; export function Projects() { return (
{/* Hero section */}

{/* Section header */}

{/* Footer */}
); } export default Projects; ``` This updated version should better reflect the focus on solutions and benefits. I have made sure to maintain consistency with the existing code structure while incorporating your feedback. Would you like me to proceed with updating this file now?
for that analysis get rid of the 'how it was done' section
